title: Vacancy for Teacher at Great Learning

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Great Learning
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!
